json_data.title: Preparation for the Major
json_data.description: Select one course from the following, or complete an equivalent course:

options.title: Intermediate Modern Japanese
courses: JAPAN 6 - Intermediate Modern Japanese
JAPAN 10 - Intermediate Modern Japanese: Intensive

options.title: Elective
courses: ASIAN 30 - Languages and Cultures of Asia
JAPAN 50 - Japanese Civilization
JAPAN 70 - Images of Japan: Literature and Film
JAPAN 75 - Anime
JAPAN 80 - How Does It Move? Action and Moving Image in Modern Japan

json_data.title: The Major
json_data.description: Select five language courses in modern or premodern language or texts selected from the following. Courses 100A, 100B, and 100C, or course 100S may be selected. Courses 101A, 101B, and 101C, or course 101S may be selected.

options.title: Language Courses in Modern or Premodern Language or Texts

JAPAN 100B - Advanced Modern Japanese
JAPAN 100C - Advanced Modern Japanese
JAPAN 100R - Third-Year Advanced Reading in Modern Japanese
JAPAN 100S - Advanced Modern Japanese: Intensive
JAPAN 101A - Fourth-Year Japanese: Advanced Reading
JAPAN 101B - Fourth-Year Japanese: Advanced Reading
JAPAN 101C - Fourth-Year Japanese: Advanced Reading
JAPAN 101S - Fourth-Year Japanese: Advanced Reading—Intensive
JAPAN 103A - Fourth-Year Japanese: Advanced Speaking I
JAPAN 103B - Fourth-Year Japanese: Advanced Speaking II
JAPAN 104 - Business Japanese
JAPAN 105A - Advanced Reading and Writing for Japanese-Heritage Speakers
JAPAN 105B - Advanced Reading and Writing for Japanese-Heritage Speakers
JAPAN 110A - Introduction to Classical Japanese: Basic Grammar
JAPAN 110B - Introduction to Classical Japanese: Reading Proficiency
JAPAN M120 - Introduction to Japanese Linguistics
JAPAN CM123 - Structure of Japanese
JAPAN 130A - Readings in Modern Japanese Literature
JAPAN 130B - Readings in Modern Japanese Literature
JAPAN 140A - Readings in Classical Japanese Literature: Heian

JAPAN 140C - Readings in Classical Japanese Literature: Edo
JAPAN C149 - Introduction to Kambun and Other Literary Styles
JAPAN 165 - Introduction to Japanese Buddhist Texts

courses: JAPAN C150 - Topics in Japanese Literature and Philosophy
JAPAN 151 - Japanese Literature in Translation: Modern
JAPAN 154 - Postwar Japanese Culture through Literature
